mapper.select:
SELECT m.id AS materialId, m.code AS materialCode, m.name AS materialName, m.model AS materialModel, m.unit_id AS unitId, u.name AS unitId_dictText, m.safety_stock AS safetyStock, IFNULL(q.qty, 0) AS currentQty FROM bas_material m LEFT JOIN bas_unit u ON m.unit_id = u.id LEFT JOIN stk_material_qty q ON m.id = q.id WHERE m.safety_stock IS NOT NULL AND m.safety_stock > 0 AND m.is_enabled = 1 AND IFNULL(q.qty, 0) < m.safety_stock
AND m.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialCode}, '%')
AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialName}, '%')
ORDER BY (m.safety_stock - IFNULL(q.qty, 0)) DESC
